svg.text: vLLM Architecture — CUDA vs QAIC Backend
Red text = override function (overrides parent class)
• init_device() — NCCL init, set CUDA device [override]
session.run() • DMA • QPC on card • async queue
• precompiled QPC or QEfficient compile path
• QPC binding metadata drives shapes and dtypes
• KV cache retained on AIC; host exchanges numpy
returns ModelRunnerOutput directly; sample_tokens() is bypassed on QAIC
▽ = inherits from ─ ─ = wraps/uses green = plugin/runtime flow orange = QEfficient compile-time path
Red text with [override] = function overrides parent class method
